name: Invalid - Truncated Packets
description: Tests packets that are truncated at various points, verifying that decoders reject them gracefully.

vectors.notes: Only header byte. Cannot read path_len.

vectors.description: Header only (1 byte, TRANSPORT_FLOOD route) - transport codes truncated
vectors.notes: Route type 0x00 requires 4 transport code bytes, but only header is present.

vectors.description: TRANSPORT_FLOOD with partial transport codes (2 of 4 bytes)
vectors.notes: Only 2 of 4 transport code bytes present.

vectors.description: TRANSPORT_FLOOD with transport codes but no path_len
vectors.notes: 5 bytes: header + 4 transport code bytes. Missing path_len.

vectors.description: FLOOD with path_len indicating 3 hops but only 1 path byte
vectors.notes: path_len=0x03 means 3 bytes of path expected but only 1 byte follows before the alleged payload. The decoder would read 3 path bytes (AA FF ??) and run out.

vectors.description: FLOOD with 2-byte hash path_len=0x42 (4 path bytes needed) but only 2 available
vectors.notes: path_len=0x42: hash_size=2, count=2, need 4 path bytes. Only 2 bytes before payload marker.
